folksonomy.title: Inneal Folkonomy

folksonomy.description: Leigidh Folksonomy le luchd-cleachdaidh tagaichean gnàthaichte a chur ri toraidhean. Thoir sùil air na h-iuchraichean uile a tha rim faighinn gu h-ìosal, rannsaich airson iuchraichean sònraichte, no cliog air iuchair sam bith gus toraidhean fhaicinn a bhios ga cleachdadh.

datasources.title: Stòran Dàta
datasources.also_checked_by: Duilleag toraidh air a sgrùdadh cuideachd le
datasources.last_modified_t: Deasachadh mu dheireadh air duilleag toraidh air {date} le
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Luchdaich suas ìomhaighean soilleir den toradh, na grìtheidean, agus fiosrachadh beathachaidh gus daoine eile a chuideachadh gus an toradh aithneachadh.
info.basic_info: Thoir seachad na prìomh fhiosrachadh mun toradh, leithid meud, pacadh, agus neach-dèanamh.
info.languages: Cuir ainmean is tuairisgeulan thoraidhean ann an diofar chànanan gus am bi an toradh ruigsinneach do barrachd luchd-cleachdaidh.
info.ingredients: Liostaich na grìtheidean uile a tha anns an toradh. Cuidichidh seo luchd-cleachdaidh le aileardsaidhean no roghainnean daithead.
info.nutrition: Cuir a-steach luachan beathachaidh gach 100g/ml mar a chithear air a’ phacaid. Cuidichidh seo luchd-cleachdaidh gus coimeas a dhèanamh eadar toraidhean.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Roghainneil, cuir beachd ris gus cunntas a thoirt air na h-atharrachaidhean agad no co-theacsa a bharrachd a thoirt seachad.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Cuidichidh an luach seo le bhith a’ dèanamh àireamhachadh co-rèireach de gach beathachadh gach meud seirbheis. Mar eisimpleir, 60 g, 60 g no 60 G (is fheàrr leat a’ chiad fhear), 1000 ml no 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Comharraich an roinn as sònraichte a-mhàin. Thèid roinnean-phàrant a chur ris gu fèin-ghluasadach. Mar eisimpleir, 'Sairdinean ann an ola ollaidh', 'Sùgh orainds bho thiugh-chruinneachaidh'.
tooltips.product_name: ’S e ainm an toraidh am prìomh ainm a tha clò-bhuailte air a’ phacaid. Faodaidh e a bhith na chomharra-malairt clàraichte. Mar eisimpleir, ‘Nesquik’, ‘Tomato Ketchup’. Na cuir a’ bhrand san ainm.
tooltips.brand_name: Cuir a-steach a h-uile suaicheantas den toradh. Bu chòir am prìomh bhrand, a tha mar as trice air a thaisbeanadh gu soilleir air aghaidh a’ phacaid, a chur a-steach an toiseach. Mar eisimpleir, ‘Nutella, ‘Oreo, Mondelez’
tooltips.quantity: Dèan lethbhreac den luach a tha air a chomharrachadh air an toradh agus na dìochuimhnich na h-aonadan. Mar eisimpleir, 230g, 6 (airson 6 uighean), 3 x 150g (airson toradh le 3 bogsaichean, gach fear de 150g).
tooltips.labels: Feart sam bith den toradh **a tha fìorasach** agus eadar-dhealaichte bho na raointean eile. Mar eisimpleir, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Dèanta sa Bheilg, air a thoirt gu buil sa Bhreatainn Bheag…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Cuir a-steach an stòr far an do cheannaich thu an toradh. Mar eisimpleir, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Cuir comharran sam bith air tùs a lorgas tu air a’ phacaid ris. Chan fheum thu a bhith draghail mu thùsan a tha air an comharrachadh gu dìreach anns an liosta tàthchuid. Mar eisimpleir, ‘Mairt-fheòil à Argentina’, ‘Chan eil an soy a’ tighinn às an Aonadh Eòrpach’.
tooltips.traceability_code: Anns an earrainn seo, faodaidh tu còdan a chuir a-steach co-cheangailte ri comharran pacaidh, comharran aithneachaidh no comharran slàinte.
tooltips.countries: Dùthchannan far a bheil an toradh ri fhaighinn gu farsaing (gun a bhith a’ gabhail a-steach stòran a tha gu sònraichte a’ dèiligeadh ri toraidhean cèin).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

edit.no_nutrition_data: Gun fhiosrachadh beathachaidh air an toradh
edit.no_nutrition_specified: Gun dàta beathachaidh air a shònrachadh
edit.comment_placeholder: Cuir beachd ris an deasachadh seo

edit.legal_warning_title: Na luchdaich suas ìomhaighean fo dhlighe-sgrìobhaidh
edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Na luchdaich suas dealbhan nach eil leat no nach eil còraichean agad orra. Tha e mì-laghail dealbhan fo dhlighe-sgrìobhaidh a luchdachadh suas às aonais cead agus dh’ fhaodadh sin do chunntas a chur fo chasg.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Na luchdaich suas ach na dealbhan agad fhèin no dealbhan aig a bheil cead sònraichte agad an cleachdadh.

landing.title: Fosgail Rannsaichear Fiosrachaidh Bidhe
landing.subtitle: Stòr-dàta co-obrachail, an-asgaidh agus fosgailte de thoraidhean bìdh bho air feadh an t-saoghail. Faigh a-mach, rannsaich, agus cuir ri follaiseachd bìdh dha na h-uile.
landing.explore_products_desc: Thoir sùil air milleanan de thoraidhean bìdh, faic fiosrachadh beathachaidh, agus dèan roghainnean fiosraichte.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

explore.title: Rannsaich Fiosrachadh Biadh Fosgailte
explore.subtitle: Faigh a-mach toraidhean fasanta, roinnean mòr-chòrdte, agus cuir ri follaiseachd bìdh!
explore.trending_products_desc: Faic dè na toraidhean a thathas a’ coimhead agus a’ deasachadh as motha an-dràsta.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Thoir sùil air na roinnean bìdh as mòr-chòrdte san stòr-dàta againn.
explore.recently_added: Air a chur ris o chionn ghoirid
explore.recently_added_desc: Thoir sùil air na toraidhean as ùire a chuir a’ choimhearsnachd ris.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Cuidich le bhith a’ leasachadh Open Food Facts le bhith a’ cur ris no a’ deasachadh thoraidhean, no a’ freagairt cheistean.
explore.random_product_desc: A bheil thu a’ faireachdainn fortanach? Lorg toradh air thuaiream bhon stòr-dàta againn.
explore.learn_more_desc: Faigh a-mach mar a tha Open Food Facts ag obair agus mar as urrainn dhut cuideachadh.
